name: Hearty Oatmeal Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together 2 cups of flour and the salt in a large bowl.
2. Heat the milk, margarine, and sugar over low heat until the margarine is soft.
3. Add the liquid to the flour mixture.
4. Beat for 2 minutes on medium speed or 300 strokes by hand.
5. Combine 1 cup of flour and the yeast.
6. Add the yeast mixture to the batter.
7. Beat for 2 minutes on medium speed or 300 strokes by hand.
8. Stir in the oats and caraway seeds with a wooden spoon.
9. Stir in enough additional flour to make a stiff dough.
10. Turn out onto a floured board and knead until smooth, 8 to 10 minutes.
11. Place in a greased large bowl and brush the top with vegetable oil.
12. Cover with a damp kitchen towel and let rise in a warm place until doubled in size, about 1 hour.
13. Punch down the dough. Divide it into two loaves.
14. Place each loaf in a greased 8 1/2" x 4 1/2" loaf pan.
15. Brush with melted margarine or butter and cover.
16. Let rise until nearly doubled, about 1 hour.
17. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
18. Bake for about 40 minutes or until brown.
19. Cool before slicing.
Makes 2 loaves.
1 slice ≈ 8 calories, 1 starch exchange, 2 grams protein, 16 grams carbohydrate, 1 gram fat, 181 mg sodium.
Quick & Easy Diabetic Menus by Betty Wedman, 1993 (Shared by Elizabeth Rodier, March 94)
